zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Peyton於1468年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾時，他的父親Thomas Peyton26歲，母親Jane de Calthorpe22歲。他於1494年與Elizabeth Clere在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1498年被列為sheriff of cambrigdeshire。他去世於1517年3月18日在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Peyton于1468年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾时，他的父亲Thomas Peyton26岁，母亲Jane de Calthorpe22岁。他于1494年与Elizabeth Clere在英国英格兰坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1498年被列为sheriff of cambrigdeshire。他去世于1517年3月18日在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Peyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Payton  .

variants.name: Payton
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from Peyton in Ramsholt (Suffolk), derived from the Old English personal name Pǣga + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

Irish (mainly County Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Peatáin ‘descendant of Peatán’, a pet form of the personal name Pádraig (see Patrick ). Outside County Donegal, the name is apparently mainly of English origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Peyton was born in 1468, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Peyton, was 26 and his mother, Jane de Calthorpe, was 22. He married Elizabeth Clere in 1494, in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. In 1498, at the age of 30, his occupation is listed as sheriff of cambrigdeshire. He died on 18 March 1517, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Peyton est né en 1468, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Peyton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jane de Calthorpe, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Clere en 1494, à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. En 1498, à l’âge de 30 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of cambrigdeshire. Il est décédé le 18 mars 1517, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Peyton 1468 in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Peyton 26 und seine Mutter Jane de Calthorpe 22. Er hat 1494 in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Clere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1498, als er 30 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of cambrigdeshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 18. März 1517 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Peyton è nato il nel 1468 nel Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Peyton, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Jane de Calthorpe, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Clere nel 1494, nel Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1498, all'età di 30 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of cambrigdeshire. Morì il 18 marzo 1517, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Peytonが1468年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Peytonは26歳，母Jane de Calthorpeは22歳であった。1494年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムでElizabeth Clereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1498年，30歳の時，職業はsheriff of cambrigdeshireと記録されている。彼は1517年3月18日に故郷で49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Peyton(이)가 1468년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Peyton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane de Calthorpe(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에서 Elizabeth Clere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1498년, 30세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of cambrigdeshire이었다. 그는 1517년 3월 18일 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에 묻혔다.

pt.1465: de 10 de janeiro de 1465 a 9 de janeiro de 1466
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Peyton nasceu em 1468, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Peyton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jane de Calthorpe, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Clere em 1494, em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1498, com 30 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of cambrigdeshire. Ele faleceu em 18 de março de 1517, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Peyton родился в 1468 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Peyton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane de Calthorpe, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Clere в 1494 г. в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1498 году, в возрасте 30 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of cambrigdeshire. Он умер 18 марта 1517 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.1465: desde 10 de enero de 1465 hasta 9 de enero de 1466
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Peyton nació en 1468, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Peyton, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Jane de Calthorpe, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Clere en 1494, en Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1498, a la edad de 30 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of cambrigdeshire. Murió el 18 de marzo de 1517, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
